'''dasosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meangirl|meangirl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meangirl|meangirl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dasosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæsesheth|dæsesheth]] || [[word:dæseshej|dæseshej]] || [[word:dæseshesh|dæseshesh]] || [[word:dæseshe|dæseshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasososhoth|dasososhoth]] || [[word:dasososhoj|dasososhoj]] || [[word:dasososhosh|dasososhosh]] || [[word:dasososho|dasososho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasoshoth|dasoshoth]] || [[word:dasoshoj|dasoshoj]] || [[word:dasoshosh|dasoshosh]] || [[word:dasosho|dasosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasofshoth|dasofshoth]] || [[word:dasofshoj|dasofshoj]] || [[word:dasofshosh|dasofshosh]] || [[word:dasofshof|dasofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dasoshotho|dasoshotho]] || [[word:dasoshojo|dasoshojo]] || [[word:dasoshosho|dasoshosho]] || [[word:dasoshoko|dasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dasoshoth|dasoshoth]] || [[word:dasoshoj|dasoshoj]] || [[word:dasoshosh|dasoshosh]] || [[word:dasosho|dasosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dasoshothol|dasoshothol]] || [[word:dasoshojol|dasoshojol]] || [[word:dasoshoshol|dasoshoshol]] || [[word:dasoshokol|dasoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dasoshothotho|dasoshothotho]] || [[word:dasoshojojo|dasoshojojo]] || [[word:dasoshoshosho|dasoshoshosho]] || [[word:dasoshoko|dasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dasoshothon|dasoshothon]] || [[word:dasoshojon|dasoshojon]] || [[word:dasoshoshon|dasoshoshon]] || [[word:dasoshokon|dasoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dasoshothoro|dasoshothoro]] || [[word:dasoshojoro|dasoshojoro]] || [[word:dasoshoshoro|dasoshoshoro]] || [[word:dasoshokoro|dasoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
